violations.text: A box and scrub brush were observed in the hand-washing sink in the kitchen (items removed). Staff were observed rinsing blender bowls in the hand-washing sink in the service area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Smoothie protein bases were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Protein balls packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
Buckets of fruit/juices were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
Paper towel dispenser was mounted at the vegetable prep sink. Dispenser to be removed prior to opening. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

The door to the outside, located in the trash room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
